creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: johans
Date: Sat Mar  1 15:01:13 2014
New Revision: 346631
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/346631
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r346631/

Log:
  Correct PORTVERSION
  Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:		ports/187178
  Submitted by:	Christoph Moench-Tegeder <cmt@burggraben.net>

Modified:
  head/devel/readline/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/readline/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/readline/Makefile	Sat Mar  1 14:34:24 2014	(r346630)
+++ head/devel/readline/Makefile	Sat Mar  1 15:01:13 2014	(r346631)
@@ -2,7 +2,8 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	readline
-PORTVERSION=	6.3.${PATCHLEVEL}
+PORTVERSION=	6.3${PATCHLEVEL}
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	GNU \
 		ftp://ftp.cwru.edu/pub/bash/
@@ -30,7 +31,7 @@ PATCHES=
 .for p in ${PATCHES:S/^/00/}
 PATCH_FILES+=	${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION:R:S/.//}-${p:C/.*(...)$/\1/}
 .endfor
-PATCHLEVEL=	${PATCHES:Q:S/ /./g:E}
+PATCHLEVEL=	${PATCHES:M1:S/1/./}${PATCHES:Q:S/^/./:S/ /./g:E}
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
